name: MASTER OF FRIED RICE
short_description: Fried rice————Wok stir-frying————Rice dynamism realized by physics calculation! Complete the best fried rice by using various ingredients!
detailed_description:
Fried rice————Wok stir-frying————Rice dynamism realized by physics calculation! Complete the best fried rice by using various ingredients!

"MASTER OF FRIED RICE" is a game cooking fried rice.
Tips:
  • Try not to spill the rice as much as possible!
  • Also, try not to spill the ingredients as much as possible! Maybe some ingredients have special rules.
  • Cook the rice evenly!
  • Cook in a short time!
  • It's good to stir-fry a lot

Total 6 stages
